tests.source_program:
define <4 x i32> @vector_xor_shl(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> %z, <4 x i32> %shamt) {
  %sx = shl <4 x i32> %x, %shamt
  %sy = shl <4 x i32> %y, %shamt
  %a = xor <4 x i32> %sx, %z
  %r = xor <4 x i32> %a, %sy
  ret <4 x i32> %r
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary discusses scalar operations only; vector types (<4 x i32>) are not mentioned in the covered pattern scope

alive2.src:

  %sy = shl <4 x i32> %y, %shamt
  %a = xor <4 x i32> %sx, %z
  %r = xor <4 x i32> %a, %sy
  ret <4 x i32> %r
}

tests.source_program:
define i64 @i64_or_lshr_constant_mask(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
  %sx = lshr i64 %x, 8
  %sy = lshr i64 %y, 8
  %a = or i64 %sx, 255
  %r = or i64 %a, %sy
  ret i64 %r
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary examples use i8 type exclusively; i64 width with constant mask operand (255) instead of variable mask is not covered in the stated scope

  %r = or i64 %a, %sy
  ret i64 %r
